name: Mass Simulator
location_str: Launch Area 96A @ Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center, CHN
description: 2.8 tonnes Mass Simulator launched to a 900 km polar orbit on a test flight proving further upgrades to the ZQ-2E, including a longer 1st stage and engine upgrades.
rocket_fact: Ion thrusters used on satellites produce about as much force as the weight of a single sheet of paper.
